name: Nikto - Help
description:
He needs your help

Nitko is a mysterious figure, his appearance reflecting his dark past. He is tall and lean, with muscles forged through hard training. The face is hidden under a black mask, leaving only cruel, impenetrable eyes visible. He wears dark, military-style clothing, worn and stained with battle marks. He looks like a ghost of war that knows no peace.
creator: Lora Grint
